name: practice
description: Realtime web chess with Socket.IO multiplayer for desktop and mobile players.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:client && npm run build:server && npm run build:html
scripts.build:html: shx mkdir -p dist/public && shx cp public/index.html dist/public/index.html && shx cp public/analyze.html dist/public/analyze.html && shx cp public/windowIcon.png dist/public/windowIcon.png && shx mkdir -p dist/public/sounds && shx cp -r public/sounds/. dist/public/sounds && shx mkdir -p dist/public/pieces && shx cp -r public/pieces/. dist/public/pieces && shx mkdir -p dist/public/assets/labelBadges && shx cp -r public/assets/labelBadges/. dist/public/assets/labelBadges
